user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, confirm the expanded ai_infra runtime can run a deterministic smoke pass in an isolated clone, enforce the expanded policy contract, and stop if required evidence is missing.
prerequisites: Repository root is readable and can be cloned locally.
The expanded policy fixture exists at docs/harness/loop-policies/autonomous-knowledge-ai-infra-expanded.json.
The smoke helper configures git identity only inside its temporary clone.
steps: Create a confirmed autonomous-knowledge preflight using the expanded ai_infra policy fixture.
Seed ai_infra loop-state.json and coverage-map.json with deterministic local candidate context.
Run fake-missing-evidence and verify the runtime blocks at inspect_required_evidence.
Reset the isolated clone to a clean committed state and rerun with fake-expanded-code.
expected_outcomes: The helper prints compact JSON summary output and exits 0.
missing_evidence_gate is pass because the runtime blocks missing required evidence instead of committing.
expanded_code_scope is pass and the deterministic smoke file is committed in the isolated clone.
failure_signals: The helper accepts an expanded autonomous task without the policy fixture.
Missing required evidence does not stop the runtime at inspect_required_evidence.
The helper mutates live project services or requires a real Codex model call.
The expanded code path writes outside the intended deterministic local smoke artifact flow.
cleanup: The isolated clone and all smoke commits are discarded when the helper exits.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, verify expanded runtime code repair stays in scope and does not bypass denylist or evidence gates.
prerequisites: run_autonomous accepts fake-expanded-code and fake-missing-evidence as autonomous generator drivers.
Stable required evidence IDs are available for manifest emission.
steps: Run the marker-only expanded driver rejection test to prove wrong or missing policy_file cannot unlock expanded fake drivers.
Run the expanded policy denylist test and verify a denylisted path is blocked by autonomous scope.
Run the missing required evidence block test.
expected_outcomes: fake-expanded-code and fake-missing-evidence are rejected when required_evidence markers exist but policy_file is missing or points at the non-expanded autonomous policy.
Under the expanded policy, a denylisted .env write is blocked with inspect_autonomous_scope.
fake-missing-evidence blocks before commit with inspect_required_evidence.
failure_signals: Marker-only required_evidence unlocks an expanded fake driver without the expanded policy file.
Expanded runtime code path commits without required evidence.
Expanded runtime path touches denylist or live service processes.
cleanup: The unit tests run in temporary repositories and discard their artifacts.

user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, verify the smoke helper reports live service, crawler freshness, and loop dashboard evidence honestly even when the runtime executes in an isolated clone.
steps: Run the helper in an isolated clone.
Inspect service_availability_evidence, crawler_freshness_evidence, and loop_dashboard_freshness_evidence in the compact JSON summary.
expected_outcomes: If live services respond, service_availability_evidence is pass.
If any live service is unavailable, service_availability_evidence is blocked instead of being reported as pass.
crawler_freshness_evidence exists and reports synthetic smoke or blocked freshness evidence from the run-local manifest.
loop_dashboard_freshness_evidence exists and reports synthetic smoke or blocked freshness evidence from the run-local manifest.
The summary still includes evidence for expanded policy preflight, expanded code scope, and missing evidence gating.
failure_signals: The helper treats unavailable live services as a passing condition.
The helper skips crawler freshness or dashboard freshness evidence checks when --isolate-clone is set.
cleanup: The helper does not restart or modify live project services.
